query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS certificates (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, userId INT NOT NULL, courseId INT NOT NULL, certificateCode VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, issueDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, expiryDate DATE, verificationUrl VARCHAR(255), createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (courseId) REFERENCES courses(id)); CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS courseRecommendations (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, userId INT NOT NULL, courseId INT NOT NULL, recommendationType VARCHAR(50), reason TEXT, recommendedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id), FOREIGN KEY (courseId) REFERENCES courses(id));
